title: Zermatt - A Mountain Getaway
description: Zermatt is a picturesque mountain town in the Swiss Alps. I literally jump from the mountain beside it.
coverAlt: The Matterhorn peak glowing with golden alpenglow at sunset against a clear sky

images.alt: The Matterhorn's rocky summit catching warm sunset light, snow and glaciers visible on its flanks with dark ridges below
images.caption: Matterhorn, the iconic mountain of the Alps, towering over the charming town of Zermatt.
